entity.summary: Japanese regulated centralized crypto exchange operated by GMO Coin, offering spot order-book trading, leverage trading, broker-style purchase, APIs, wallets, staking, lending, and related digital-asset services.
entity.notes: The official company page identifies GMO Coin, Inc. as a Japanese crypto-asset exchange business registered with the Kanto Local Finance Bureau and established in October 2016. The incorporation date is not used as the exchange launch date because the first-party source does not establish service launch on that exact date. Current API documentation was rechecked in July 2026 and includes exchange status, market data, authenticated trading, account operations, REST and WebSocket access, and a change history through June 2026.

evidence.title: GMO Coin company information
evidence.notes: First-party company information identifies GMO Coin, Inc., its October 2016 establishment, Japanese address, crypto-asset exchange business registration, and financial-instruments registration.

evidence.title: GMO Coin exchange service page
evidence.notes: Current first-party exchange page documents live spot order-book trading, leveraged exchange trading, maker/taker order behavior, WebTrader, and public/private API access.

evidence.title: GMO Coin Japan exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Secondary exchange registry corroborates the GMO Coin Japan exchange identity; first-party company and product pages remain the classification and status authority.

evidence.title: GMO Coin cryptocurrency API documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation covers exchange status, tickers, order books, trades, KLine data, public WebSocket feeds, balances, deposits and withdrawals, orders, positions, authenticated REST and WebSocket APIs, and a change history extending through 2026-06-27.
